title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Cars24 South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Cars24 South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Cars24 South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Vadodara-based team.

About Cars24 South Asia Partners:
Cars24 South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24 South Asia Partners!
